title: Historical Post-Smoke Repo-Parity Housekeeping And Migration Gate Planning
historical_note: This packet records one bounded Olares Phase 5 repo-parity housekeeping and migration-gate planning slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.
current_routing: use PROJECT_STATUS.md for the current residue-retirement lane and latest completed packets
use docs/architecture/OLARES-PUBLICATION-BOUNDARY-RETIREMENT-DEPENDENCY-INVENTORY-2026-05-06.md for the remaining post-cutover boundary closeout queue
use this packet JSON only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier `olares-phase-5-009` repo-parity housekeeping and migration-gate planning slice
objective: Perform a bounded repo-technical-authority planning pass after Packet 008 to define how current workstation-only Phase 5 artifacts should be committed, published, and synchronized into the canonical parent-root history before any later workstation-migration readiness reassessment is considered.
dependency_note: Packet 008 proves the prepared host parent-root mirror is viable at the committed parent-root HEAD. This packet exists because the remaining blocker is no longer host reachability or workspace ergonomics; it is the repo-parity and publication-state gate for current workstation-only Phase 5 artifacts.
required_inputs: The Packet 008 evidence that `/home/olares/code/apex` is reachable, clean, correctly rooted, and usable as a bounded workspace-open candidate
The current workstation-only Phase 5 handoffs, packet JSON files, routing updates, roadmap changes, and authority-doc edits
The GitHub-canonical parent-root publication boundary at `C:/APEX Platform`
The requirement that `/home/olares/code/apex` remain the host parent-root mirror and `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` remain preserved historical evidence
constrained_outputs: A dated planning handoff that classifies which current Phase 5 artifacts should be committed/published, deferred, or kept as comparison-only evidence
A recorded decision on what publication-state conditions must be satisfied before any later workstation-migration readiness reassessment packet opens
No migration approval, no host runtime mutation, no old-clone mutation, and no widening into AI-services, Gitea, or canonical-hosting work
validation_steps: Review the current workstation-only Phase 5 files and classify them into commit/publish, defer, or comparison-only buckets.
State what must reach committed parent-root history before `/home/olares/code/apex` can be treated as current authority rather than last-published authority.
Define how the prepared host mirror should be synchronized after that publication step without mutating `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
State whether a later migration-readiness reassessment packet becomes warranted only after this repo-parity gate is satisfied.
Stop if execution would require migration approval, host runtime mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, canonical-hosting changes, or mutation of the preserved old clone.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes repo-authority planning only. It does not authorize database writes, migration, host-runtime mutation, old-clone mutation, AI-services rollout, Gitea work, or canonical-hosting changes.
closure_note: Not yet executed. This packet exists because the post-008 reassessment concludes that the remaining blocker is repo-parity and publication-state governance, not host-path viability.
next_action: Execute this packet only within the bounded planning scope defined here and only if workstation-migration readiness remains under consideration as a later reassessment candidate.
